title: QuarantineReport
description: Schema for the FlakyTestQuarantineEngine execution report.

testName.description: Human-readable title of the test as it appears in the Mocha suite.

failureCount.description: Total cumulative failures recorded across all CI runs.

lastFailureReason.description: The message or classification of the most recent failure. Null if never failed.

stabilityScore.description: Computed score from 0.0 (completely unstable) to 1.0 (fully stable). Derived from failure count over observed runs.

status.description: Current quarantine lifecycle state of the test. Active = executing normally. Quarantined = excluded from regression. Released = graduated back after demonstrating stability.
